reason: roadmap_next: add show_blocked parameter to return blocked items with blockers
roadmap_deprecate: handle re-deprecation, cascade block dependents, extend TTL

diff --git a/.opencode/tool/roadmap_deprecate.ts b/.opencode/tool/roadmap_deprecate.ts
index 0dbac6463..79f5871e6 100644
--- a/.opencode/tool/roadmap_deprecate.ts
+++ b/.opencode/tool/roadmap_deprecate.ts
@@ -24,13 +24,28 @@ export default tool({
     if (!items[args.item_id]) return JSON.stringify({ error: `Item '${args.item_id}' not found` }, null, 2)
 
     const item = items[args.item_id]
+    const wasAlreadyDeprecated = item.status === "deprecated"
+    const previousReason = item.deprecation_reason || null
     const exp = new Date(Date.now() + 30 * 86400000).toISOString()
+
     item.status = "deprecated"

-    item.deprecation_replacement = args.replacement || null
